Package org.openapitools.codegen.config

Enclosing class:

    • build

      public GeneratorSettings build()
      Returns a GeneratorSettings built from the parameters previously set.
      Returns:
      a GeneratorSettings built with parameters of this GeneratorSettings.Builder
